_note: Recent (2026 Q2) post-training techniques shelf. Maturity is honest: LoRA/QLoRA/GRPO/DPO/on-policy-distillation are the ESTABLISHED core (default recommendations). The 2026 items below are mostly single-paper/experimental — shown as an 'explore' shelf, NOT as defaults. Every entry has a real URL. Headline truth: nothing displaced LoRA/QLoRA in the last 3 months; the real 2026 change is engineering maturity (TRL v1.0) and distillation pipelining.

established.name: TRL v1.0
established.note: 2026-03, 75+ trainer 프로덕션 API — 알고리즘 아닌 성숙

what.ko: student rollout + live teacher 교정, full RL보다 싸고 exposure-bias 해소
what.en: student rollout + live teacher correction; cheaper than full RL, fixes exposure bias

what.ko: generation buffer(최대 40x)·외부 teacher 서버·binary logprob — prompts만으로 live 증류
what.en: generation buffer (up to 40x) · external teacher server · binary logprob — live distill from prompts only

what.ko: 한 어댑터가 여러 sub-rank 제공 → 재학습 없이 추론 시 rank 선택
what.en: one adapter serves multiple sub-ranks → pick rank at inference, no retrain

what.ko: 층별 적응 rank(Integrated Gradients+불확실성) — 균일 rank보다 우수
what.en: per-layer adaptive rank (Integrated Gradients + uncertainty) — beats uniform rank

when.en: auto-allocate rank under a fixed budget

what.ko: 저가치 rollout을 RL 중 가지치기(importance-sampling 보정)
what.en: prune low-value rollouts during RL (importance-sampling corrected)

when.en: when rollout generation is the bottleneck

what.ko: 장문맥 추론 RL을 activation 패턴으로(RoPE 스케일링 너머)
what.en: long-context reasoning RL via activation patterns (beyond RoPE scaling)
two-stage FT trains a context compressor (NIAH → multi-hop)

when.ko: 추론 모델에 넣는 유효 context 축소
when.en: shrink effective context fed to reasoning models
